form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[评审编码] orgId[业务组织] reviewDate[评审日期] reviewType[评审类型] relatedBillType[关联单据类型] relatedBillCode[关联单据号] participants[参与人员] =========>result[结果信息]====== conclusion[结论] actionRequired[需采取行动] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[评审编码] orgId[业务组织] reviewDate[评审日期] reviewType[评审类型] relatedBillType[关联单据类型] relatedBillCode[关联单据号] participants[参与人员] =========>result[结果信息]====== conclusion[结论] actionRequired[需采取行动] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[评审编码] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] reviewType[评审类型] reviewDate[评审日期]
